capabilities.title: Storage Tanks
capabilities.desc: API 650 / 620 vertical storage tanks, spheres and bullets up to 100 m diameter — engineered, fabricated and erected for bulk liquid and pressurised storage.

capabilities.title: Pressure Vessels
capabilities.desc: ASME 'U' and 'U2' stamped pressure vessels, columns, reactors, KO drums and heat exchangers — including heavy-wall and cryogenic service.

capabilities.title: EPC Projects
capabilities.desc: Turnkey engineering, procurement and construction of storage terminals, process facilities and distribution infrastructure — foundation to commissioning.

capabilities.title: Engineering & Design
capabilities.desc: In-house multidiscipline design across mechanical, piping, civil, structural and E&I — built on PV Elite, CAESAR II, STAAD and AME Tank.

capabilities.title: Shop Fabrication
capabilities.desc: Heavy fabrication in a 300,000 sq ft Dubai works — plate rolling to 70 mm, CNC cutting and drilling, and certified welding across SMAW, FCAW, TIG and SAW.

capabilities.title: Operations & Maintenance
capabilities.desc: Shutdown, refurbishment and integrity works for static equipment, piping and tankage across brownfield Oil & Gas and utility sites.

facility_specs.label: Fabrication Facility
facility_specs.desc: Covered and open fabrication yards in Dubai Investment Park.

facility_specs.label: Plate Rolling
facility_specs.desc: Hydraulic plate rolling for heavy-wall shells.

facility_specs.label: CNC Cutting Gauge
facility_specs.desc: CNC plasma and oxy-fuel profile cutting.

facility_specs.label: CNC Drilling
facility_specs.desc: CNC drilling for nozzles and structural work.

certs.title: ASME 'U' Stamp
certs.desc: Authorised to design and fabricate pressure vessels to ASME Section VIII Division 1.

certs.title: ASME 'U2' Stamp
certs.desc: Authorised for pressure vessels to ASME Section VIII Division 2 (alternative rules).

certs.title: NBBI 'R' Stamp
certs.desc: National Board authorisation for the repair and alteration of pressure-retaining items.

certs.title: Quality Management
certs.desc: ISO 9001 certified quality management system across engineering and fabrication.

certs.title: Occupational H&S
certs.desc: ISO 45001 certified occupational health and safety management system.

timeline.text: Awarded EPC for Aviation Fuel Storage by ADNOC, and supply of spheres for the NMDC / Técnicas Reunidas ADNOC MERAM project.
Awarded EPC project for cryogenic ethylene storage tanks.
Awarded EPC storage tanks at the ADNOC BFIP project (via CPECC).
Awarded storage tank projects at ADNOC Dabbayia.
Prequalified with ADNOC as an EPC / Fabrication contractor.
Acquired by private investors with a focus on medium-to-large EPC contracts.
Opened the wider GCC export market.
EPC division established with a focus on storage facility projects.
On-site construction of API 650 tanks and AWWA D100 water tanks.
Production startup — manufacture of gas cylinders and pressure vessels.
Company inception by decree of H.H. Sheikh Rashid Bin Saeed Al Maktoum.
